narrative_constraints.statement: The project site is defined as the 'Transformatiegebied Legmeer', bounded by Hamarskjöldsingel (west), the tramlijn Amsterdam-Uithoorn (north), Bovenkerkerweg (east), and the Nationaal Tennis Centrum (south).

reasons: The yellow boundary on the aerial image clearly delineates the transformation area. Exact coordinates cannot be extracted from the raster image; geometry parser should handle vector extraction.

programme_hints: The area is identified as a transformation zone ('Transformatiegebied Legmeer'), implying redevelopment of an existing urban area. Adjacent landmarks include Canon (office/logistics), Nationaal Tennis Centrum, and residential neighbourhoods Westwijk and Middenhoven.
urban_intent_passages: Transformatiegebied Legmeer — aerial overview showing the project boundary delineated by Hamarskjöldsingel, tramlijn Amsterdam-Uithoorn, Bovenkerkerweg, and the Nationaal Tennis Centrum, situated between the neighbourhoods Westwijk and Middenhoven.
